# CVS Health Innotech Summer Undergraduate Internship 2025 - Pharmacy & Consumer Wellness Tech - Software Developer Interview Preparation

Prepare for your CVS Health Innotech Summer Undergraduate Internship 2025 - Pharmacy & Consumer Wellness Tech - Software Developer internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Smithfield, RI
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from CVS Health
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

CVS Health is offering a Innotech Summer Undergraduate Internship 2025 - Pharmacy & Consumer Wellness Tech - Software Developer internship position in Smithfield, RI. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research CVS Health's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your CVS Health interview and increase your chances of success.
